case_title: MOLLIE NOKES et al VS. HORNEFF WADDLE CORPORATION

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY NOKES, MOLLIE MILLER, WILLIAM AS TO DEFENDANT HORNEFF WADDLE CORPORATION ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-26-2013 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF NOKES, MOLLIE MILLER, WILLIAM RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HORNEFF WADDLE CORPORATION $774.28 PRINCIPAL, $195.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $969.28, PLAINTIFFS ARE ENTITLED TO ADDITIONAL REFUND OF SECURITY DEPOSIT AS FOLLOWS: $180.78 (LEASING COMMISSION), $479.00 (LATE FEES) $100.00 (3 DAY NOTICE FEE), $14.50 (RENT BOARD FEE), AS IMPERMISSIBLE DEDUCTIONS FROM SECURITY DEPOSIT UNDER CIVIL CODE SECTION 1950.5 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY FILED BY PLAINTIFF NOKES, MOLLIE AS TO DEFENDANT HORNEFF WADDLE CORPORATION
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT HORNEFF WADDLE CORPORATION
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FEE FOR SERVICE $120.00 SERVED JUL-22-2013, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT HORNEFF WADDLE CORPORATION

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-26-2013 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-26-2013 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFFS (2) WERE PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS REPRESENTED BY MICHELLE HORNEFF COHEN--PROPERTY MANAGER. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-26-2013 - JUDGMENT.
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $253.12 ACCRUED INTEREST AS TO PLAINTIFF NOKES, MOLLIE
